since_last: 35% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +2.72%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.35% · BTC -0.01% · Gold -0.05% · Nasdaq100 -0.27%. 35% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +2.72%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +2.72%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.11%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DELL is the standout at -10.13%
cards.body: Leaders: POWL +5.47%, BABA +4.85%, PINS +4.80%, AAPL +4.07%, ORCL +3.40%. Laggards: DELL -10.13%, SKHY -9.24%, MU -7.98%, MRVL -7.01%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.69% at $135.14
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.69% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
